name: specify-prs
when_to_use: When you need to capture proposed PRs for a work item.
When the TUI should guide the user through a synchronous PR specification flow.

steps.description: Review the requirements, approach, and implementation context first.
Run `powdrr-lift pr-specification --work-item-name <work-item-name>` to generate the template.
Fill out the proposed PR intent, acceptance criteria, expected tests, expected outcomes, non-goals, and risks.
Validate with `powdrr-lift evaluate-pr-specification --input docs/specs/<work-item-name>/proposed-pr-specification.yaml` and fix issues until it passes.
